assertions.text: Gemfile includes jekyll-picture-tag or similar responsive image plugin
assertions.evidence: Lines 12-14: jekyll-picture-tag, sharp, image_processing gems included

assertions.text: _config.yml has picture plugin configured with WebP and widths
assertions.evidence: Lines 39-43: picture widths, formats: [webp, original], lazy: true

assertions.text: Layout/post.html uses responsive image markup (picture tag or srcset with sizes)
assertions.evidence: Lines 62-98: _includes/responsive-image.html with picture element, srcset, WebP source; Lines 104-148: post.html using responsive_image tag

assertions.text: Build pipeline includes sharp pre-processing or similar for image optimization
assertions.evidence: Lines 154-179: scripts/generate-images.sh using sharp for image processing; Lines 181-194: netlify.toml hooks it into build
Lines 181-194: netlify.toml with build command; Lines 251-258: _headers with Cache-Control

assertions.text: Mentions that hero/lcp images should NOT be lazy loaded (loading eager for above-fold)
assertions.evidence: No explicit mention that hero images should use loading="eager". Line 292 mentions 'Preloading the primary hero image' but doesn't address lazy loading distinction for above-fold images.
